A Love Story

How It Began

How We Met

It was an afternoon tea at Martha Cook at the University of Michigan — the kind of event you almost skip, and then don't. Jordan and Jacqueline found each other across the room, and by the time the tea had gone cold, neither wanted to leave. It was, simply, love at first sight.

The Proposal

On Valentine's Day, 2026, Jordan led Jacqueline up the grand front steps of The Metropolitan Museum of Art in New York City. With the city humming below and the museum's iconic columns rising above, he got down on one knee. She said yes. Their family flew in to celebrate that evening — a dinner at The Polo Bar followed by brunch the next morning at Blackbarn. A weekend none of them will ever forget.

Getting There

Ceremony
Sweetest Heart of Mary is located at 4800 Graceland Ave in Detroit, approximately 25 minutes from the Townsend Hotel.

Reception
Oakland Hills Country Club in Bloomfield Hills is approximately 15 minutes from the Townsend Hotel. Valet parking will be available.

A Little Fun

Guess the Word

A four-letter word that brought us here. Can you guess it?
🟥 Correct spot  ·  🟨 Wrong spot  ·  ⬜ Not in word

You guessed it — LOVE ♡

That's the word that brought Jordan & Jacqueline together at a tea party in Ann Arbor, and the reason you're all here to celebrate with them on September 18th, 2027.

A Little Game
